---
title: "Analytic Hierarchy Process"
description: |
  Exploration in Analytic Hierarchy Process (AHP). 
output: distill::distill_article
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

# Credits

"Analytical Hierarchy Process" by CBAKhan [Video Link Here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sExZVh5GTdk)

# Notes

![AHP 01](images/04-ahp/ahp-1.png){width=50%}![AHP 02](images/04-ahp/ahp-2.png){width=50%}

![AHP 03](images/04-ahp/ahp-3.png){width=50%}![AHP 04](images/04-ahp/ahp-4.png){width=50%}
![AHP 05](images/04-ahp/ahp-5.png){width=50%}![AHP 06](images/04-ahp/ahp-6.png){width=50%}
